# Jonathan Guy — TheJonathanGuy.com

> Personal site of Brandon B. Jonathan Guy. Operator, AI Solutions Architect, and founder of PointWake Innovations. Husband and father in the Texas Hill Country.

## Pages

- [Home](https://thejonathanguy.com/): Bio, origin story, companies, principles.
- [Meet the Family](https://thejonathanguy.com/family.html): Audriana and our boy. Hill Country family life.
- [Lake Life](https://thejonathanguy.com/lake-life.html): Canyon Lake, the boat, wake surfing, Hill Country.
- [Contact](https://thejonathanguy.com/contact.html): Email, LinkedIn, and links to companies.

## Identity

- Full name: Brandon B. Jonathan Guy
- Common name: Jonathan Guy
- Wife: Audriana
- Location: Canyon Lake, Texas, USA (Texas Hill Country)
- Hometown: Madison, Mississippi
- Email: jonathan@pointwake.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jonathan-guy
- Tagline: You get out what you put in.

## Active companies

- [PointWake Innovations](https://pointwake.com/) — Founder. AI-enabled workflow automation for service businesses, property managers, and industrial operators.
- [Stonecastle Hill Country](https://stonecastlehillcountry.com/) — Hill Country roofing and exteriors. Canyon Lake, Spring Branch, San Antonio, Austin.

## Principles

1. Family, faith, work — in that order.
2. Lead with your voice. Mean what you say.
3. Documentation is leverage.
4. You get out what you put in.

## Education

- University of Texas at Austin, McCombs School of Business — Post-Graduate Program in Generative AI for Business (April 2026)
- Madison Central High School (Madison, MS) — 2002

## Career sketch

- 2025 – present · Founder and principal consultant, PointWake Innovations
- 2024 – present · Hill Country lead, Stonecastle Roofing
- 2024 – 2025 · Contract AI training data specialist, Mercor / Project Balboa
- 2007 – 2022 · Founder/CEO, All-Star Inflatables (acquired); GM Bounce-A-Roo
- 2008 – 2022 · Strategic accounts at Guy Enterprises (Nissan, Continental Tire, McAlister's, Cinnabon, state DMVs)
- 2005 – 2008 · Co-owner, The Quarter Bistro
